# SIOJ

Canonical language routes:
- Portuguese: https://sioj.org/pt
- English: https://sioj.org/en

SIOJ is the Sistema Simbiótico de Interoperabilidade e Organização Jurídica, also described in English as the Symbiotic System for Legal Interoperability and Organization.

SIOJ is an independent research laboratory for cognitive governance, legal knowledge organization, legal interoperability and Human-AI symbiosis.

Founder and research lead: Anderson Siqueira Lourenço.

Institutional contact: anderson@sioj.org.

Public research:
- Portuguese: https://sioj.org/pt/pesquisa
- English: https://sioj.org/en/research
- Working Paper No. 01: Algorithmic Stress and the Collapse of Cognitive Load
- Periodização Informacional Humano-IA / Human-AI Informational Periodization

Public method:
- Portuguese: https://sioj.org/pt/metodo
- English: https://sioj.org/en/method

Contact:
- Portuguese: https://sioj.org/pt/contato
- English: https://sioj.org/en/contact

Discovery files:
- https://sioj.org/sitemap.xml
- https://sioj.org/robots.txt
- https://sioj.org/humans.txt
- https://sioj.org/opensearch.xml
- https://sioj.org/sioj-metadata.json
- https://sioj.org/ai-chunks.json

External public references:
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4849-9245
- GitHub: https://github.com/siojadmin/sioj-site
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/siojintegratesystemoflegalorganization/posts/sioj-labs-paper-162826221

- SIOJ

Public project namespace:
- sioj-site: public institutional website and discovery surface for sioj.org.
- sioj-core: institutional namespace reserved for core method and architecture.
- sioj-docs: institutional namespace reserved for public documentation.
- sioj-labs: institutional namespace for public research tracking.
- sioj-research: institutional namespace for working papers and research outputs.
- sioj-api: future institutional namespace for API surfaces.
- sioj-rag: future institutional namespace for retrieval architecture.
- sioj-security: future institutional namespace for security and validation.
- sioj-data: future institutional namespace for data structures.
